etymology.description: 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") + 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") = foot on a moving boat -> used as phonetic with 刀(刀) (dāo, "knife") -> original form of 剪(剪) (jiǎn, "to cut") -> stylized into 前(前) (qián, "front")
etymology.interpretation: The character 歬 originally depicted a foot on a boat, symbolizing forward movement, which is a clear representation of progression or advancing. It later became a phonetic element in forming 剪 with the addition of the knife, emphasizing its use in cutting.
